title: Purple Minecraft
description: This texture pack is designed for people who love purple, but I definitely advise you to try downloading it for those people who don't like it.
body: This resource pack is only needed for people who love purple. I myself am new to creating packs, so this is my first job in the future I will try to do more and cooler resource packs and more on the new version, and so I will try to do more on the new version of minecraft thank you for downloading my resource pack, I will be grateful to you.
